        MTLCreateSystemDefaultDevice
      • MTLCreateSystemDefaultDevice(): MTLDevice
  • Exports
Source   Edit  

Returns the preferred system Metal device.

Imports

types

Procs

proc MTLCreateSystemDefaultDevice(): MTLDevice {.importc, cdecl,
    dynlib: "/System/Library/Frameworks/Metal.framework/Metal", ...raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
